name: session-file-changes-diff-overlay
title: Session file changes diff overlay
description: Show session-scoped agent file changes in a floating chat overlay and render non-Git unified diffs from sidecar-tracked tool snapshots.
creator: pi-agent
notes: Implemented non-Git sidecar tracking for edit/write tool changes, session changes APIs, floating changed-files panel, and unified diff modal. Product decision: MVP excludes bash scanning.
